driver_subject: iio: humidity: hts221: Move symbol exports into IIO_HTS221 namespace
kernel_subject: PM: core: Add NS varients of EXPORT[_GPL]_SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS and runtime pm equiv
stage1_reason: Changes involve kernel namespace export API (EXPORT_SYMBOL_NS), PM macro update (EXPORT_SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS with pm_sleep_ptr), and explicit header inclusion due to ongoing kernel header cleanup.
stage2_reason: Driver commit 2129f25de582 uses EXPORT_SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS() which matches kernel commit a8e2512efc65 introducing NS variants of EXPORT_SIMPLE_DEV_PM_OPS macros. The driver migration aligns with kernel API changes for PM macros and namespace support.
